data.body: BUG 59bc FIXED + live-GREEN. runner honors per-request budget (effective_max_iterations); RunnerAgentStep scales verify budget 25/finding; verify-failure recovery preserves findings + fail-open-unless-blocking; observability verify_requests. Live re-run of the 3 INDETERMINATE tickets: 8e6f BLOCK / 92fa PASS(33 req) / 9df3 PASS(23 req), all real verdicts, none hollow. Full unit suite 2465 passed; make lint clean. Live caught a false-green (test asserted req.config; runner read self._config). Calibration (3d3d) + bug (59bc) both code-complete + validated; awaiting commit/PR decision.
